creator: b.shertenlieb@yahoo.com
text:
Created attachment 255000
diff file for update to 1.41.2.9134

multimedia/plexmediaserver-plexpass: Update to 1.41.2.9134

 * New release from Plex.tv

  Changelog:

   https://forums.plex.tv/t/plex-media-server/30447/652

    NEW:
     (DVR) Added additional HW encoding settings for controlling
      DVR transcode output quality and file size.
     (Live TV) Use software decoders for livetv transcodes in
      order to avoid system errors.
    FIXES:
     (Scanner) Some very specific file paths could cause movie
      scanning to exit prematurely.
    (Subtitles) Certain external subtitle files fail when being
     parsed for automatic syncing.
    (Subtitles) When using the subtitle search function, make
     downloaded subtitle available to all media versions.
    (Transcoding) HW transcodes of VC1 files could hang instead
     of presenting an error.
    (Transcoding) Transcoding music files could cause PMS to crash.
    (Win64 Installer) Update Service parameters are now updated
     during server auto-update.

    * Removed information in package message about Intel GPU
       Offloading and replaced with statement that this feature
       had been removed in 1.32.2.7002 of the FreeBSD version
       release.

  QA:

   portlint OK (0 fatal errors)
